mapper.select: select * from jst_rebate_settlement where settlement_id = #{settlementId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1 for update

select rs.settlement_id, rs.settlement_no, rs.channel_id, c.channel_name, rs.apply_amount, rs.negative_offset_amount, rs.actual_pay_amount, rs.status, rs.invoice_status, rs.audit_remark, rs.pay_voucher_url, rs.apply_time, rs.pay_time, rs.update_time from jst_rebate_settlement rs left join jst_channel c on c.channel_id = rs.channel_id and c.del_flag = '0' where rs.settlement_id = #{settlementId} and rs.del_flag = '0' limit 1
